description.en: The normalized tangential pressure of the pointer input (also known as barrel pressure orcylinder stress) in the range-1to1, where0is the neutral position of the control.

excerpt.es: The normalized tangential pressure of the pointer input (also known as barrel pressure orcylinder stress) in the range-1to1, where0is the neutral position of the control.
excerpt.en: The normalized tangential pressure of the pointer input (also known as barrel pressure orcylinder stress) in the range-1to1, where0is the neutral position of the control.

description.en: The plane angle (in degrees, in the range of-90to90) between the Y芒聙聯Z plane and the plane containing both the pointer (e.g., pen stylus) axis and the Y axis.

excerpt.es: The plane angle (in degrees, in the range of-90to90) between the Y芒聙聯Z plane and the plane containing both the pointer (e.g., pen stylus) axis and the Y axis.
excerpt.en: The plane angle (in degrees, in the range of-90to90) between the Y芒聙聯Z plane and the plane containing both the pointer (e.g., pen stylus) axis and the Y axis.

description.en: The plane angle (in degrees, in the range of-90to90) between the X芒聙聯Z plane and the plane containing both the pointer (e.g., pen stylus) axis and the X axis.

excerpt.es: The plane angle (in degrees, in the range of-90to90) between the X芒聙聯Z plane and the plane containing both the pointer (e.g., pen stylus) axis and the X axis.
excerpt.en: The plane angle (in degrees, in the range of-90to90) between the X芒聙聯Z plane and the plane containing both the pointer (e.g., pen stylus) axis and the X axis.

description.en: The clockwise rotation of the pointer (e.g., pen stylus) around its major axis in degrees, with a value in the range0to359.

excerpt.es: The clockwise rotation of the pointer (e.g., pen stylus) around its major axis in degrees, with a value in the range0to359.
excerpt.en: The clockwise rotation of the pointer (e.g., pen stylus) around its major axis in degrees, with a value in the range0to359.
